payload.title: cargo trust build/run/test — set the wrappers internally, zero env vars
payload.description: Biggest single win. cargo-trust (crates/cargo-trust/src/main.rs) currently just forwards args to the `trust` CLI. Extend it so `cargo trust build|run|test` sets RUSTC_WRAPPER and RUSTDOC to the bundled shim paths itself and shells out to the corresponding cargo command. Deletes the entire 'Using strict source from cargo' section of the README — no realpath, no export, no remembering that rustdoc ignores RUSTC_WRAPPER. Pure plumbing: no new concepts, no compiler work. Needs to locate the shim binaries reliably (alongside the cargo-trust binary, or via a known install layout). Acceptance: a fresh strict crate builds and runs green via `cargo trust run` with no env vars touched.
